title: BoomHud Compose Manifest
description: Composition manifest for combining multiple design sources into a single generation run.

root.description: Name of the root component/document to use as the composition root. If omitted, uses the first source's document name.

sources.description: List of source file paths (relative to manifest location). Order matters: first source provides default root if not specified.

tokens.description: Path to token registry file (relative to manifest). If omitted, uses standard auto-discovery (ui/tokens.ir.json).

targets.description: Target backends to generate for. If omitted, must be specified via CLI --target.

output.description: Output directory (relative to manifest). If omitted, uses CLI --output or current directory.

namespace.description: Namespace for generated code. If omitted, uses CLI --namespace.
